Fetch multiple years of NJ school finance

Source: R/fetch_finance.R
fetch_finance_multi.Rd

Fetch multiple years of NJ school finance

Usage

fetch_finance_multi(end_year_vector, tidy = TRUE, use_cache = TRUE)

Arguments

end_year_vector

vector of school years (end of the academic year). See get_available_finance_years for valid values.

tidy

logical, default TRUE. See fetch_finance.

use_cache

logical, default TRUE. See fetch_finance.

Value

A single tibble, the per-year results of fetch_finance stacked.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
library(dplyr)

# Statewide per-pupil total over time
fetch_finance_multi(2018:2024) %>%
  filter(is_state, metric == "per_pupil_total") %>%
  select(end_year, value)
} # }
